code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line().ok_or("no input")?
  let n = string.parse_int(string.trim(line)).ok_or("invalid input")?
  mut a = 0
  mut b = 1
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let t = a + b
    a = b
    b = t
    i = i + 1
  end
  print("fib=#{a}")
  Ok(())
end
